entry.title: Maaveeran X Veerame Jeyam | Sivakarthikeyan | Kollywood | Movie Posters
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

A bold minimalist artwork inspired by Sivakarthikeyan’s Maaveeran, designed with intense red-black contrast and powerful heroic symbolism.

Featuring a towering retro-action silhouette, dramatic shadow composition, and iconic Tamil typography, this artwork creates a strong cinematic statement for modern wall setups and gaming rooms.


Product Details:

  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • Minimal Tamil cinematic artwork style
  • High-contrast red & black visual aesthetic
  • Inspired by the movie Maaveeran
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Sivakarthikeyan & Tamil movie fans
  • Gaming & entertainment room decor
  • Minimal bold wall aesthetics
  • Modern studio & bachelor room setups

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

Dark futuristic artwork featuring Megatron in a highly detailed cybernetic armor design with glowing red optics and cinematic metallic textures.

Built with an intense sci-fi atmosphere, battle-worn mechanical detailing, and a premium monochrome aesthetic that makes a bold statement in modern gaming and entertainment setups.


Product Details:

  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • Ultra-detailed robotic sci-fi artwork
  • Dark metallic tones with cinematic lighting
  • Sharp futuristic typography styling
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Gaming & streaming room setups
  • Transformers & sci-fi fans
  • Dark aesthetic wall decor
  • Modern entertainment spaces

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: Be the Damn Penguin | Cinematic Antarctic Motivation Poster
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type: Poster
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

A lone penguin walks away from the crowd—into the quiet, the cold, and the unknown. “Be the damn PENGUIN” is a bold reminder to stop following the comfortable route and start choosing the meaningful one.

This design blends minimal, ultra-cinematic Antarctic scenery with strong typographic impact—massive negative space, soft misty mountains, and a subtle trail of footprints that pulls your eye forward. Perfect for anyone building discipline, chasing a bigger goal, or simply needing a daily nudge to stay different.

Perfect for: workspace walls, study setups, gyms, creative studios, dorm rooms, and gift ideas for friends who love motivation, minimal design, and documentary-style aesthetics.

Highlights

  • Clean, minimal composition with dramatic scale and calm blue-grey tones

  • Bold typography + subtle “meaning” copy for an editorial poster feel

  • High-impact wall presence without looking loud or cluttered

Note: Frame not included (print only).

entry.title: Hi Nanna | A Love Remembered | Emotional Aesthetic | Movie Posters
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

Celebrate one of the most heartfelt cinematic moments with this Hi Nanna – A Love Remembered aesthetic wall poster. Designed with soft painterly textures, dreamy tones, and gentle light, this artwork captures the warmth, innocence, and deep emotional connection that defines the film.

Whether you're a fan of Nani, Mrunal Thakur, or simply love soulful romance stories, this poster brings a calming, nostalgic feel to any space. Perfect for bedrooms, study rooms, and creative workspaces, it serves as a reminder of love that heals, memories that stay, and bonds that are never forgotten.

Printed on premium-quality matte art paper, this poster delivers rich colors, subtle details, and a cinematic finish—making it a beautiful addition to your aesthetic room décor.

entry.title: The Truman Show | I Chose the Door | Minimal Aesthetic | Movie Poster
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

Step into one of cinema’s most powerful metaphors with The Truman Show – I Chose the Door poster. This minimalist design captures Truman’s iconic moment of choosing truth over comfort, freedom over illusion. The soft sky-blue palette, symbolic staircase, and calm composition make it a perfect addition for aesthetic lovers, movie fans, and anyone drawn to motivational art.

Printed on premium materials with sharp details and a matte finish, this poster elevates bedrooms, study rooms, workspaces, or creative setups. A meaningful reminder to choose your own path — no matter how difficult the climb.

Bring home a piece of cinematic history that inspires courage, individuality, and self-discovery.

entry.title: Customize Your Wall POSTER
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 99.00 - 179.00 (4 variants)

Premium high-definition wall poster of Customize Your Wall POSTER, designed to instantly upgrade the aesthetic of your room.

Printed on ultra-thick 300 GSM matte photo paper for rich colours, sharp detailing and a soft anti-glare finish. Long-lasting, fade-resistant and crafted to give your wall a clean, premium look with zero effort.

This poster blends perfectly into bedroom, living room, gaming setup or workspace décor. Easy to frame, perfect for collage walls, and ideal for anyone who loves aesthetic room vibes, minimal design and high-quality prints.

A great pick for personal use or gifting — made to match your vibe and elevate your space.

entry.title: Wanna Cook | Breaking Bad | Series Poster
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

Bring raw intensity and iconic energy to your wall with this “Wanna Cook?” cinematic lab poster, inspired by the gritty, neon-lit world of underground chemistry.
Featuring two figures in hazmat suits, captured from a dramatic low-angle perspective, the artwork radiates pressure, adrenaline, and that unforgettable lab-sequence atmosphere.

The glowing industrial lights, rising smoke, neon accents, and metallic reflections create a high-contrast, high-energy scene that instantly elevates any room.
With the bold phrase “WANNA COOK?”, this poster embodies rebellion, genius, and the thrill of stepping into a world where everything is at stake.

Perfect for gaming setups, bachelor rooms, entertainment spaces, studios, and anyone who loves intense cinematic visuals with a bold attitude.

Add this piece to your wall and let your room speak with iconic confidence.

entry.title: The Ideal Beauty | Vintage Noir Aesthetic | Monica Bellucci | Celebrities Poster
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

Elevate your space with this striking The Ideal Beauty Vintage Noir Aesthetic Monica Bellucci Celebrities Poster, designed with the elegance and drama of old Hollywood photography. The black-and-white grain, film scratches, and moody lighting create an instantly cinematic feel, turning the artwork into a bold statement piece for any modern interior.

Soft shadows, expressive posture, and refined editorial typography come together to celebrate timeless beauty — not as something seen, but something felt.
The quote,
“A face remembered by the way it feels, not the way it looks,”
adds emotional depth, making the artwork more than décor: it becomes an atmosphere.

Perfect for bedrooms, studios, cafés, creative workspaces, dressing areas, or anyone drawn to retro photography, monochrome minimalism, and high-fashion editorial style.

This poster brings sophistication, nostalgia, and a touch of artistic rebellion to any wall.

entry.title: The Lifespan of Love | Frankenstein Art Poster | Movie Poster
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

Celebrate one of the most tender reinterpretations of classic literature with this beautifully illustrated Frankenstein Romantic Art Poster.
The artwork captures a quiet, intimate moment between Elizabeth and the Creature — a scene painted with emotion, vulnerability, and the aching beauty of connection.

Wrapped in flowing white fabric and soft painterly textures, Elizabeth rests gently against the Creature, while a single autumn leaf glows like a symbol of hope in his hand.
The quote,
“To be lost and to be found, that is the lifespan of love.”
adds a poetic depth, turning this illustration into a visual meditation on longing, acceptance, and the redemptive power of love.

The contrasting color palette — warm red on one side, cool blue on the other — enhances the duality of their worlds: fear and comfort, despair and tenderness, creation and humanity.

Perfect for bedrooms, reading corners, art studios, libraries, or anyone who loves emotional storytelling and atmospheric illustration.

This poster is not just décor — it’s a moment of love captured in brushstrokes.

entry.title: A leaf | Frankenstein Art Poster | Movie Poster
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

Bring a touch of emotion and literary magic to your space with this beautifully illustrated Frankenstein-inspired art poster.
Unlike the usual dark interpretations, this artwork captures a rare moment of vulnerability — the creature, chained yet gentle, reaching out with hesitant hope, and Elizabeth responding with quiet compassion.

Floating autumn leaves add movement and symbolism, blending innocence with melancholy and highlighting the fragile humanity within the creature.
Soft painterly textures, muted tones, and delicate dialogue create a cinematic storytelling experience that appeals to readers, art lovers, and anyone who appreciates emotional depth.

Perfect for bedrooms, study corners, libraries, creative studios, and aesthetic wall setups, this poster brings warmth, narrative, and a deeply human touch to classic literature.
